summary: Staggered word fade-in transition text card component for Remotion.

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/title-word-fade/src/TitleWordFade.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `TitleWordFade` and `titleWordFadeDefaultProps`, then register the `TitleWordFade` composition with duration 120, fps 30, width 1920, and height 1080.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Title Word Fade Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/title-word-fade to my project. Preserve the exported TitleWordFadeProps API and register the TitleWordFade composition with the default props.
